touches.ai_summary: Cold outreach to VP of Sales at CoastalMetrics regarding sales productivity challenges. Mentioned common pain points in healthcare IT sales teams and offered initial call.
next_steps: Await response to schedule introductory call

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sharing case study of similar healthcare IT company that improved rep productivity by 32%. Savannah responded expressing interest in learning more.

questions_asked.question: What specifically does your solution do differently than other call intelligence tools?
questions_asked.answer: Explained our AI-powered workflow automation and integration capabilities beyond basic transcription

next_steps: Schedule discovery call for next week

touches.ai_summary: Sent meeting availability and agenda for discovery call. Savannah confirmed time and mentioned she'd like to understand implementation timeline.

questions_asked.question: How long does typical implementation take for a team our size?
questions_asked.answer: Shared that 40-seat deployments typically take 2-3 weeks with full onboarding support

touches.ai_summary: Pre-call email with discovery agenda and questions about current sales process. Savannah replied confirming agenda and noting she'd have specific questions about reporting capabilities.

Initial discovery call with Savannah. Discussed current challenges with sales visibility and manual CRM updates. Team of 39 reps struggling with call follow-up and pipeline accuracy. Mentioned they're evaluating a couple options including Fathom.

questions_asked.question: Can your system automatically update Salesforce after each call?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, demonstrated our bi-directional Salesforce sync and automatic activity logging

questions_asked.question: What's your experience with healthcare sales teams specifically?
questions_asked.answer: Shared three healthcare IT customer examples with similar use cases

objections: Savannah mentioned they're also looking at Fathom and want to compare features carefully
next_steps: Schedule deeper dive call for next week

touches.ai_summary: Sent follow-up with meeting recap, ROI calculator, and feature comparison including Fathom. Savannah replied thanking for the thorough breakdown and requested to include two of her sales managers in next call.

questions_asked.question: Can we get Sofia and Lisa on the next call to see the reporting features?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely, sent calendar invite for all three

touches.ai_summary: Extended discovery with Savannah, Sofia (Sales Manager), and Lisa (Sales Manager). Deep dive into current process gaps, manual reporting burden, and coaching workflow. Lisa asked detailed questions about procurement and security. Team expressed frustration with current point solutions.

questions_asked.question: What does your security certification process look like?
questions_asked.answer: Outlined SOC 2 Type II, HIPAA compliance, and standard security questionnaire process

questions_asked.question: How does your coaching functionality compare to standalone tools?
questions_asked.answer: Walked through coaching workflows, deal intelligence, and manager dashboard features

questions_asked.question: Can we see actual customer dashboards or is it just demo data?
questions_asked.answer: Offered to arrange reference call with similar healthcare customer

touches.ai_summary: Post-discovery email with security docs, customer reference contact, and proposed demo agenda. Savannah confirmed demo time and mentioned she wants to loop in Kwame (SVP Revenue) once they see the platform.

Full platform demo with Savannah, Sofia, Lisa, and Jude (Implementation Lead). Walked through end-to-end workflow from call recording to automated CRM updates to manager reporting. Team engaged throughout, asking detailed questions about customization and rollout.

questions_asked.question: Can we customize which fields auto-populate in Salesforce?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, demonstrated field mapping configuration and custom workflow setup

questions_asked.question: How do you handle multiple CRM instances or sandbox testing?
questions_asked.answer: Explained multi-environment support and testing best practices

questions_asked.question: What does the rollout process look like with 39 users?
questions_asked.answer: Outlined phased rollout approach, training schedule, and success metrics

next_steps: Connect with Kwame for executive overview

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up demo focusing on advanced reporting and analytics requested by Lisa. Showed manager dashboards, pipeline health metrics, and rep performance tracking. Camila (Account Manager) joined to see account management workflows.

questions_asked.question: Can we export these reports to our existing BI tools?
questions_asked.answer: Confirmed API access and standard export formats for data warehouse integration

questions_asked.question: How does pricing scale if we add users mid-contract?
questions_asked.answer: Explained annual true-up process and pro-rated mid-year additions

touches.ai_summary: Technical evaluation with Jude leading implementation questions. Tested Salesforce integration in their sandbox, reviewed API documentation, discussed SSO setup, and validated data security protocols. Jude thorough but satisfied with technical approach.

questions_asked.question: What's required from our IT team during implementation?
questions_asked.answer: Outlined minimal IT lift - mainly SSO config and Salesforce admin permissions

questions_asked.question: How do you handle call recording consent in different states?
questions_asked.answer: Explained built-in compliance features and customizable consent workflows

questions_asked.question: What does your SLA look like for support response times?
questions_asked.answer: Shared support tier options and typical response/resolution SLAs

questions_asked.question: Can we pilot with a subset of users before full rollout?
questions_asked.answer: Confirmed pilot approach is recommended and outlined success criteria framework

next_steps: Jude to share technical findings with Savannah

touches.ai_summary: Sent formal proposal document with pricing for 39 seats, implementation timeline, and success plan. Outlined automations plus consulting package to address their coaching needs.

touches.ai_summary: Check-in email on proposal review status. Savannah replied that team is aligned on value but wants to ensure Kwame sees the strategic ROI before moving to contracting.

questions_asked.question: Can you join the exec meeting to walk Kwame through the productivity impact?

touches.ai_summary: Executive meeting with Kwame (SVP Revenue) and Savannah. Presented strategic value, rep productivity ROI, and pipeline visibility improvements. Kwame supportive and focused on time-to-value and ensuring adoption across all reps.

questions_asked.question: What's your success rate getting full team adoption in similar deployments?
questions_asked.answer: Shared adoption metrics from comparable customers and change management approach

touches.ai_summary: Pricing discussion with Savannah and Lisa. Reviewed proposal details, payment terms, and contract structure. Lisa asked about volume discount given team size and multi-year options.

questions_asked.answer: Explained trade-offs and recommended minimum for their coaching use case

Second exec meeting with Kwame to address final questions on ROI and competitive positioning. Kwame pressed on differentiation from Fathom and whether premium pricing justified for their needs. Productive discussion but clear budget sensitivity.

questions_asked.question: What specific outcomes do customers see that they don't get with simpler tools?

questions_asked.answer: Presented year-two discount structure and maximum flexibility available
